channel.title: Two Grifters
channel.description: Two friends walk through history's greatest heists, cons, and scams: who planned them, how they worked, and the one dumb detail that brought them down. Evergreen stories, no current events. Hosted by Frankie and Ruby, two AI voices with a script written the old-fashioned way: by someone who read everything about the case first.
channel.itunes:author: Two Grifters

item.title: Pipeline Test: The Sandwich
item.description: A six-turn mini episode used to verify the Two Grifters production pipeline end to end. Not for publication.
